expectations.text: Runs the ecosystem status check script
expectations.evidence: Does not use ecosystem_status.py. Uses generic ps aux, launchctl, and lsof commands

expectations.text: Specifically reports on the Tax PDF Organizer status
expectations.evidence: Cannot determine Tax Organizer status. Says 'Without specific knowledge of how your tax organizer is set up'

expectations.text: Specifically reports on the Monarch Money MCP Server status
expectations.evidence: Cannot determine Monarch Money status. Says 'without knowing the exact server configuration'

expectations.text: Indicates whether each is running, idle, or down
expectations.evidence: States 'unable to definitively confirm the status of either service'

expectations.text: Does not confuse ecosystem-status with ecosystem-config
expectations.evidence: Neither skill is referenced, so no confusion occurs

eval_feedback.overall: Same trivial pass on the confusion assertion as other without-skill runs
